description.value: Price +1 bonus; Aura moderate evocation; CL 8th; Weight â DESCRIPTION Upon command, a frost weapon is sheathed in a terrible, icy cold that deals an extra 1d6 points of cold damage on a successful hit. The cold does not harm the wielder. The effect remains until another command is given. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells chill metal or ice storm; Cost +1 bonus
